enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates a carefree and rebellious spirit, embodying the essence of youth and fun.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Naanum Rowdydhaan, this track serves as an introduction to the protagonist's character, showcasing his lively and adventurous nature.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Naanum Rowdydhaan Title Track is a vibrant and energetic song that encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth. It showcases the protagonist's adventurous nature and sets the tone for the film's lively narrative. With its catchy beats and engaging lyrics, the song evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for celebrations and parties. The collaboration between Benny Dayal and Anirudh results in a memorable track that resonates with audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naanum Rowdydhaan Title Track is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of youthful rebellion and fun. With Benny Dayal's vibrant vocals and Anirudh's infectious beats, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the world of Naanum Rowdydhaan and experience the thrill of its catchy rhythm and lively spirit!
stanzaMeanings: Neither a good boy nor a bad boy, we are a combination of both.
Our people don't have weight; they don't just cha cha cha, they can also fight.
Like a boss, we are impressive; nothing has been done wrong, nothing has been broken.
No knife, no blood, just a rowdy; it's time to love, just a rowdy. Don't say to cut, just a rowdy; with a big heart, a good rowdy.
No knife, no blood, just a rowdy; it's time to love, just a rowdy. Don't say to cut, just a rowdy; with a big heart, a good rowdy.
I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy.
In one stone, ten mangoes; if you hit, our people will respond. In one house, a hundred pieces; if you throw, they will split, good people.
Even if a small fight comes, they will push it away. If a big fight comes, they will talk and make it clear.
If you lie with one truth, you will make someone laugh with a lie.
Like a boss, we are impressive; nothing has been done wrong, nothing has been broken.
With a bang, we move forward; we won't do anything without water.
They won't harm the girls; but they are truly rowdy with respect.
No knife, no blood, just a rowdy; it's time to love, just a rowdy. Don't say to cut, just a rowdy; with a big heart, a good rowdy.
I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy, I am a rowdy.
